label: tokenizer-compression-public-distill
command: python -c "import json; from ava.train import summarize_corpus; corpus='corpora/public_benchmark_distill_v1'; configs={'byte':{'kind':'byte'},'byte_bpe':{'kind':'byte_bpe','path':'artifacts/tokenizers/public_distill_byte_bpe_384.json'},'hf_bpe':{'kind':'hf_bpe','path':'artifacts/tokenizers/public_distill_hf_bpe_384.json'},'hf_unigram':{'kind':'hf_unigram','path':'artifacts/tokenizers/public_distill_hf_unigram_384.json'}}; payload={name:summarize_corpus(corpus,cfg) for name,cfg in configs.items()}; print(json.dumps(payload, indent=2))"
argv: import json; from ava.train import summarize_corpus; corpus='corpora/public_benchmark_distill_v1'; configs={'byte':{'kind':'byte'},'byte_bpe':{'kind':'byte_bpe','path':'artifacts/tokenizers/public_distill_byte_bpe_384.json'},'hf_bpe':{'kind':'hf_bpe','path':'artifacts/tokenizers/public_distill_hf_bpe_384.json'},'hf_unigram':{'kind':'hf_unigram','path':'artifacts/tokenizers/public_distill_hf_unigram_384.json'}}; payload={name:summarize_corpus(corpus,cfg) for name,cfg in configs.items()}; print(json.dumps(payload, indent=2))
